subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy letter was perused, and its contents were noted, concerning trials and tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله مکتوبت ملاحظه گردید و بر مضمون اطلاع حاصل شد از امتحان و افتتان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
